summary: Playwright e2e + axe-core a11y suite for Pulse dashboard. Real Astro dev server via webServer. 8/8 tests pass.

tests.command: bun run test:e2e (in packages/web) or bun run test:e2e (root)

fixes_applied: global.css: footer <a> now has text-decoration:underline to resolve axe 'link-in-text-block' serious violation (color-contrast + no underline for inline link)

fixtures.seeding_strategy: global-setup.ts backs up real data/snapshots → spec beforeAll seedSnapshots() / clearSnapshots() → global-teardown.ts restores. Single worker, fullyParallel:false to avoid concurrent seeding conflicts.

notes: First run initially failed on a11y gate with one serious violation (link-in-text-block for footer Astro link). Fixed root cause in global.css, not test. Gate is a real build blocker working as designed.
Keyboard-tab test checks every focusable element (footer link) for focus ring via outline + outline-style + box-shadow; auto-skips if page has no focusables.
Mobile project (chromium-mobile/iPhone SE) defined in config but disabled for this run — responsive.spec covers both 1440 and 375 viewports within desktop project via setViewportSize.
